title: Minty Chewy Syrian Rice Bowl
description: A quick, grassy, chewy rice bowl featuring Castelvetrano olives, candy sugar, and a hint of mint, gluten‑free and ready in minutes.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until water runs clear.
In a saucepan, bring 250ml water to a rolling boil and add a pinch of salt.
Add the rice to the boiling water, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes until tender.
While the rice cooks, heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat and sauté the sliced olives until slightly caramelized, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the chopped mint leaves, lemon zest, and minced garlic into the skillet, cooking for an additional minute.
Drain the cooked rice and fluff it with a fork, then transfer to a serving bowl.
Drizzle the hot olive oil and olive mixture over the rice, ensuring even distribution.
Sprinkle the candy sugar over the rice and stir gently to combine, allowing the sweet granules to melt slightly.
Drizzle honey over the bowl, then season with salt to taste, and give one final gentle mix.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra mint leaves if desired.
